title: Jamaican Tofu Skewers
description: Grilled Jamaican tofu skewers with a crispy, umami flavor, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: extra-firm, drained and cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Jamaican seasoning, olive oil, and umami sauce. Add tofu and toss to coat.
Thread tofu onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until tofu is golden brown and crispy.
Brush skewers with lemon juice and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve skewers hot with crispy onions on top.
